title: Create site/README.md with post-v0.3 project-meta info
acceptance_criteria: site/README.md is created at the root of the site package.
The README has a short description of what the site is (Cloverleaf methodology site) and how to develop it (cd site && npm run dev).
The README mentions the base path ('/cloverleaf') so a newcomer knows where dev server serves content.
No other files in the site package are modified.
definition_of_done: site/README.md exists and is readable; no rendered-route files touched; affected-routes CLI returns [] for the diff.
